name: grafos-monorepo
description: Sistema de Gestão Escolar Grafos - Monorepo

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:landing"
scripts.build: npm run build:api && npm run build:frontend && npm run build:landing
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start:api" "npm run start:frontend" "npm run start:landing"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd api && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ../landing && npm install

author: Grafos Educação
